name: docjacket
description: Connect DocJacket transactions, key dates, tasks, contacts, and document checklists to Codex. v0.6 adds inbox-workflow skills — match Gmail emails to active deals, classify attachments, run morning briefings, prep for closings, send follow-ups from your connected mailbox.

interface.description: Full read + send tool suite for DocJacket transactions, plus seven workflow skills (TC context, daily triage, execution workflow, email triage, document filing, follow-up drafting, closing prep). Call mcp_catalog after install for the live tool inventory. The chat is the approval gate.
